mapper.select: SELECT PROD_ID , HNDSET_MODEL_ID , NVL((SELECT IMG_PATH FROM NMCP_PROD_IMG_DTL WHERE PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND ROWNUM = 1),'') IMG_PATH FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS A WHERE HNDSET_MODEL_ID = #{modelId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT B.DTL_CD, B.DTL_CD_NM, B.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1, B.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2, B.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS A , NMCP_CD_DTL B WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = #{key} AND A.CD_GROUP_ID = B.CD_GROUP_ID

SELECT A.USERID AS USERID, A.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD, A.NAME AS NAME, A.AUTH_CODE AS AUTHCODE, A.PIN AS PIN, REGEXP_SUBSTR (A.EMAIL, '[^@]+', 1, 1 ) AS EMAIL1, REGEXP_SUBSTR (A.EMAIL, '[^@]+', 1, 2 ) AS EMAIL2, A.POST AS POST1, A.ADDRESS AS ADDRESS1, A.ADDRESS_DTL AS ADDRESS2, A.MOBILE_NO AS MOBILENO, A.CONTACT_NO AS CONTRACTNO, A.BIRTHDAY AS BIRTHDAY, A.LOGIN_COUNT AS LOGINCOUNT, A.USER_DIVISION AS USERDIVISION, A.GENDER AS GENDER, A.STATUS AS STATUS, A.SMS_RCV_YN, A.EMAIL_RCV_YN, B.WITHD_CODE AS SECEDEREASON, B.WITHD_DESC AS SECEDEREASONDESC, A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, (SELECT C.CODE_NAME FROM MCP_CODE C WHERE C.CODE = B.WITHD_CODE AND C.CODE_SYS = 'RFS' ) AS RECDESC FROM MCP_USER A , MCP_REC_USER B WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID(+) AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{value})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_USER A , MCP_REC_USER B WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID(+) AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND UPPER(A.PASSWORD) = UPPER(#{pw})
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET PASSWORD = #{pwChange}, PWD_CHG_DT = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{id})

UPDATE MCP_USER SET
MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo},
EMAIL = #{email},
POST = #{post},
ADDRESS = #{address1},
ADDRESS_DTL = #{address2},
PASSWORD = #{password}, PWD_CHG_DT = SYSDATE,
SMS_RCV_YN = #{smsRcvYn},
EMAIL_RCV_YN = #{emailRcvYn},
PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE = #{personalInfoCollectAgree},
OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE = #{othersTrnsAgree},
CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG = #{clausePriAdFlag},
USER_DIVISION = #{userDivision},
CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId},
AUTH_TEL_CODE = #{authTelCode},
SYS_CDATE = #{sysCdate},
SYS_UDATE = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})

UPDATE MCP_USER SET MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo},
SMS_RCV_YN = #{smsRcvYn},
EMAIL_RCV_YN = #{emailRcvYn},
CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId},
USER_DIVISION = '01', SYS_UDATE = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_DIVISION FROM MCP_USER WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid}) AND MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET MOBILE_NO = #{phone} WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userId})
UPDATE MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG SET REP_NO = DECODE(#{phone},CNTR_MOBILE_NO,'R','') , SYS_UDATE = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO , CONN_DATE , TMSCNT , CODE , AMD_DT FROM NMCP_RETV_RSTRTN WHERE CODE = #{cd} AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{ncn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_RETV_RSTRTN (SVC_CNTR_NO, CONN_DATE, CODE) VALUES (#{ncn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{cd})
mapper.update: INSERT INTO MCP_REC_USER ( USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, USER_DIVISION, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, LOGIN_COUNT, REVOCATION_DATE, STATUS, WITHD_CODE, WITHD_DESC ) SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO, USER_DIVISION, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, LOGIN_COUNT, SYSDATE, '3' , #{secedeReason}, #{secedeReasonDesc} FROM MCP_USER WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})

UPDATE MCP_USER SET PASSWORD = '' ,NAME = '탈퇴회원' ,AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' ,CUST_NUM = '' ,AUTH_KEY = '' ,PIN = '' ,USER_DIVISION = '' ,EMAIL = '' ,EMAIL_CODE = '' ,POST = '' ,ADDRESS = '' ,ADDRESS_DTL = '' ,ADDRESS_BJD = '' ,MOBILE_NO = '' ,CONTACT_NO = '' ,BIRTHDAY = '' ,GENDER = '' ,LOGIN_COUNT = '0' ,STATUS = '3' ,REVOCATION_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
mapper.select: SELECT USERID AS userid , NAME AS name , AUTH_CODE AS authCode , PIN AS pin , EMAIL AS email , POST AS post , ADDRESS AS address1 , ADDRESS_DTL AS address2 , MOBILE_NO AS mobileNo , CONTACT_NO AS contractNo , BIRTHDAY AS birthday , GENDER AS gender , STATUS AS status , USER_DIVISION AS userDivision FROM MCP_USER WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND PASSWORD = #{pw}
SELECT NM AS NAME FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE USER_ID = #{userid} AND USER_STTUS != '4'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE USER_ID = #{userid} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NMCP_USER_HST( HST_CRET_DT, USER_ID, LOGIN_PWD, NM, AUT_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, ZIPCD, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CTN, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, CRET_DT, LOGIN_DT, LOGIN_CNT, USER_STTUS, CUST_NO, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIV, EMAIL_CODE, REVOCATION_DATE, PWD_CHG_LAST_DT, EMAIL_RCV_YN, SMS_RCV_YN, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT, CLAUSE_PERSONAL_AD_YN, CUSTOMER_ID ) SELECT SYSDATE, USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYSDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, REVOCATION_DATE, PWD_CHG_DT, EMAIL_RCV_YN, SMS_RCV_YN, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid}

UPDATE NMCP_USER_HST SET( HST_CHG_DT, LOGIN_PWD, EMAIL, ZIPCD, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, AMD_DT, LOGIN_DT, LOGIN_CNT, USER_STTUS, USER_DIV, PWD_CHG_LAST_DT, EMAIL_RCV_YN, SMS_RCV_YN, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT, CLAUSE_PERSONAL_AD_YN ) = ( SELECT SYSDATE, PASSWORD, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, SYSDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, USER_DIVISION, PWD_CHG_DT, EMAIL_RCV_YN, SMS_RCV_YN, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid} ) WHERE USER_ID = #{userid} AND HST_CRET_DT = ( SELECT HST_CRET_DT FROM ( SELECT HST_CRET_DT FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE USER_ID = #{userid} AND USER_STTUS='1' ORDER BY HST_CRET_DT DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT '' POINT_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT SEQ_DATE||LPAD(SEQ_NUM, 5, '0') AS seqSr , SEQ_DATE AS seqDate , SEQ_NUM AS seqNum , CTN , NAME , ACT_DATE AS actDate , BIRTHDAY , MODEL_NM AS modelNm , MODEL_SR AS modelSr , CRET_DT AS cretDt , USER_ID AS userId FROM NMCP_CERT_HIST A WHERE USER_ID=#{userId} AND SEQ_DATE = (SELECT MAX(SEQ_DATE) FROM NMCP_CERT_HIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) AND SEQ_NUM = (SELECT MAX(SEQ_NUM) FROM NMCP_CERT_HIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SEQ_DATE = A.SEQ_DATE)

SELECT TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.MODEL_MONTHLY, '0')) MODEL_MONTHLY , NVL(B.MODEL_INSTALLMENT, 0) MODEL_INSTALLMENT , NVL(B.REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, 0) REAL_MDL_INSTAMT , NVL(B.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) MODEL_DISCOUNT2 , NVL(B.MAX_DISCOUNT3, 0) MAX_DISCOUNT3 FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY
{CALL P_MCP_MRKT_AGR(#{userId},#{emailAgrYn},#{smsAgrYn})}

SELECT GUBUN, TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS REGST_DTTM, TO_CHAR(MAX(RVISN_DTTM), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_MRKT_HIST WHERE USERID = #{userId} GROUP BY GUBUN
mapper.insert:
SELECT NMCP_RATE_CHG_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_RATE_CHG ( CHG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_NAME, RES_NO, RATE_CD, FILE_PATH, EXT, FILE_NM, CREATE_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{chgSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{contractNum}, #{cstmrName}, #{resNo}, #{rateCd}, #{filePath}, #{ext}, #{fileNm}, #{createYn}, #{regstId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE /*Mypage.selectNmcpRateChg */ NMCP_RATE_CHG SET FILE_PATH = #{filePath}, EXT = #{ext}, FILE_NM = #{fileNm}, CREATE_YN = #{createYn}, RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE, ERROR_DESC = #{errorDesc} WHERE CHG_SEQ = #{chgSeq} AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: SELECT /*Mypage.selectNmcpRateChg */ CHG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_NAME, RES_NO, RATE_CD, FILE_PATH, EXT, FILE_NM, CREATE_YN, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DTTM FROM NMCP_RATE_CHG WHERE CHG_SEQ = #{chgSeq} AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
{CALL P_MCP_RATE_CHG(#{chgSeq}, #{contractNum})}

SELECT CHG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_NAME, RES_NO, RATE_CD, FILE_PATH, EXT, FILE_NM, CREATE_YN, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DTTM FROM NMCP_RATE_CHG
AND CREATE_YN = #{createYn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_SELFCARE_STATISTIC WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND EVENT_CD = #{eventCd} AND SYS_RDATE > SYSDATE + INTERVAL '-2' HOUR
SELECT COMMEND_ID FROM MCP_COMMEND_ID_MNG WHERE CONTRACT_NUM =#{contractNum}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO, CUST_ID, CNTR_MOBILE_NO, EVENT_CD, EX_COLUM1, EX_COLUM2, EX_COLUM3 FROM SUSPENCHGTMP WHERE EVENT_CD = #{eventCd} AND ERRCODE IS NULL ORDER BY EX_COLUM1 ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 300
SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO , CUST_ID , CNTR_MOBILE_NO , GN_NO , ERRCODE , SYS_RDATE , MSG FROM SUSPENCHGTMP
SELECT SNS_CD FROM NMCP_SNS_LOGIN_TXN WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /*MypageMapper.checkAllreadPlanchgCount 최근 60분 내 요금제 변경 이력 확인 */ COUNT(1) FROM MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE WHERE 1=1 AND NCN = #{ncn} AND T_SOC_CODE = #{tSocCode} AND SYS_RDATE > (SYSDATE-1/24) -- 1시간 AND EVENT_CODE = 'FIN' -- 최종 AND TRTM_RSLT_SMST = 'SUCCESS' -- 완료 성공 AND SYS_DT =TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- INDEX 위한

SELECT USERID, GUBUN, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, AGR_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT USERID, GUBUN, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, AGR_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY GUBUN ORDER BY STRT_DTTM DESC) AS RN FROM MCP_MRKT_HIST WHERE USERID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_LOGIN_HISTORY SET NAME = '탈퇴회원', PHONE = '00000000000' WHERE USERID = #{userid}
mapper.select: SELECT MINOR_AGENT_CI FROM MCP_USER_AGENT WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A, MCP_USER B WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO= #{ncn} AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userId})
SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO ,RATE_CD ,EX_COLUM2 ,EX_COLUM3 ,EX_COLUM4 ,EX_COLUM5 ,EX_COLUM6 FROM TMP_CHRG_PRMT_CHECK WHERE ERRCODE IS NULL
SELECT QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC, CALL_CNT FROM NMCP_RATE_MST WHERE 1=1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND ROWNUM= 1
